Line 280:  WriteLiteral(@"
Line 281:  </form>
Line 282:  
Line 283:  
Line 284:  <style>
Line 285:      .t-grid-content tr > td:hover .menu_block + .display_menu
Line 286:      {
Line 287:          display: block !important;
Line 288:      }
Line 289:  
Line 290:      .display_menu
Line 291:      {
Line 292:          left: 65px;
Line 293:          overflow: visible;
Line 294:          position: absolute;
Line 295:          top: -5px;
Line 296:          background: #fff;
Line 297:          border: 1px solid #ddd;
Line 298:          z-index: 100;
Line 299:      }
Line 300:  
Line 301:      .t-grid-content tr > td
Line 302:      {
Line 303:          overflow: visible !important;
Line 304:          position: relative;
Line 305:      }
Line 306:  
Line 307:      .display_menu > ul
Line 308:      {
Line 309:          padding: 0 16px;
Line 310:      }
Line 311:  
Line 312:      .display_menu li
Line 313:      {
Line 314:          list-style: none outside none;
Line 315:          width: 143px;
Line 316:      }
Line 317:  </style>
Line 318:  <script");
Line 319:  
Line 320:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 2683, 650, true);

Line 325:  );

Line 328:  
Line 329:  WriteLiteral("></script>\r\n<script");

Line 335:  , 3390), false)

Line 339:  
Line 340:  WriteLiteral("></script>\r\n<script");
Line 341:  
Line 342:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3419, 19, true);
Line 343:  
Line 344:  BeginContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3438, 23, true);
Line 345:  
Line 346:  WriteLiteral(" type=\"text/javascript\"");
Line 347:  
Line 348:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3438, 23, true);
Line 349:  
Line 350:  BeginContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3461, 1552, true);
Line 351:  
Line 352:  WriteLiteral(">\r\n    $(function () {\r\n        jQuery.noConflict();\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    function Clo" +
Line 353:  "seMe() {\r\n        $(\"#genericPopup\").dialog(\'close\');\r\n        //$(\".t-icon .t-r" +
Line 354:  "efresh\").trigger(\'click\');\r\n\r\n        window.location.replace(window.location.hr" +
Line 355:  "ef);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n      function Selectall() {\r\n        // if check all is checked," +
Line 356:  " all radio buttons  are selected\r\n          // if check all is unchecked, all ra" +
Line 357:  "dio buttons are cleared\r\n\r\n          if ($(\'#rbtnSelectAll1\').is(\':checked\')) {\r" +
Line 358:  "\n              debugger;\r\n              $(\'input:radio[name$=rbtnSelect1]\').each" +
Line 359:  "(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    $(this).attr(\'checked\', \'c" +
Line 360:  "hecked\');\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n        else {\r\n              $(\'inpu" +
Line 361:  "t:radio[name$=rbtnSelect1]\').each(\r\n                function () {\r\n             " +
Line 362:  "       debugger;\r\n                    $(this).removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n          " +
Line 363:  "      });\r\n          }\r\n\r\n    }\r\n\r\n      $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]\').cl" +
Line 364:  "ick(\r\n    function () {\r\n        // if any of the checkbox is unchecked\r\n       " +
Line 365:  " // check all checkbox should be cleared\r\n        if (!$(this).is(\':checked\')) {" +
Line 366:  "\r\n            $(\'#chkSelectAll\').removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n        }\r\n        else" +
Line 367:  " {\r\n            // if all of the checkbox is checked\r\n            // check all c" +
Line 368:  "heckbox should be checked\r\n            if ($(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]\')." +
Line 369:  "length ==\r\n            $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]:checked\').length) {\r\n " +
Line 370:  "               $(\'#chkSelectAll\').attr(\'checked\', \'checked\');\r\n            }\r\n  " +
Line 371:  "      }\r\n    });\r\n</script>\r\n\r\n");
Line 372:  
Line 373:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3461, 1552, true);
Line 374:  
Line 375:          }
Line 376:      }
Line 377:  }
Line 378:
